headline: Hormel Foods Names First CTO As Tech Focus Meets Valuation Debate
summary: Hormel Foods (NYSE:HRL) has created its first Chief Technology Officer role. Donald Monk has been appointed CTO to lead enterprise technology and digital transformation. The move reflects a company wide focus on technology, data and modern digital capabilities. Hormel Foods, best known for its branded food products across retail and foodservice, is now putting technology leadership more clearly in focus through the new CTO position. For you as an investor, this adds another layer to how the...

headline: The SPAM® Brand and Bachan's® Serve Up Crave-Worthy, Limited-Edition Japanese Barbecue Flavor
summary: The SPAM® brand and Bachan's® have teamed up to launch a bold new product: SPAM® Japanese Barbecue Sauce Flavored, a limited-edition variety made with Bachan's® Original Japanese Barbecue Sauce. This first-of-its-kind collaboration brings together two beloved pantry staples rooted in Asian American food culture, blending the iconic sizzle of the SPAM® brand with a savory drizzle of Bachan's® to deliver an umami-rich flavor in every bite. headline: Hormel Foods faces transportation cost pressures
summary: Tighter freight capacity in fiscal Q1 led to higher logistics expenses as the company continues to deal with elevated beef and pork prices.

headline: Stephens Turns Slightly More Positive on Hormel Foods (HRL) After Earnings
summary: Hormel Foods Corporation (NYSE:HRL) is included among the 14 Best Dividend Stocks to Invest in Under $50. On February 27, Stephens raised its price recommendation on Hormel Foods Corporation (NYSE:HRL) to $27 from $25. It reiterated an Equal Weight rating on the shares. The firm said investors could become somewhat more constructive because of the […]
